loadColorImage(byte, byte[], DisplayListener) - Method in interface com.newland.nsdk.core.api.external.display.ExtDisplay
Loads color image into external device for ExtDisplay.displayColorImage(byte[], boolean, com.newland.nsdk.core.api.external.display.DisplayColorImageParameters, com.newland.nsdk.core.api.external.display.DisplayListener) to display image.
loadFirmwareOrAppFile(String, byte[], UpdateListener) - Method in interface com.newland.nsdk.core.api.external.devicemanager.ExtDeviceManager
Deprecated.
Replaced by ExtDeviceManager.update(UpdateFiles, UpdateListener).
loadImage(byte, byte[], DisplayListener) - Method in interface com.newland.nsdk.core.api.external.display.ExtDisplay
Loads black-and-white image into external device for ExtDisplay.displayImage(byte, int, int) to display image.
loadTrustedCert(boolean, byte[]) - Method in interface com.newland.nsdk.core.api.external.keymanager.ExtKeyManager
Verifies Newland certificate and returns its public key.

Verifies Newland certificate and returns its public key.

Whether or not to enable and display Lockscreen settings: `Settings -> Device -> Screen lock` 0: Enable 1: Disable
